summary: NotificationBell component testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Tested: (1) Backend notification APIs (GET /api/notifications, PUT /{id}/read, PUT /read-all), (2) Desktop landing page bell with badge and dropdown, (3) Mobile landing page bell positioned between Welcome message and hamburger menu, (4) Mark all read functionality clears badge, (5) Click-to-navigate to /my-enquiries, (6) Bell visibility on search page via shared Header.js, (7) Bell NOT visible when NOT logged in.

tests.test: GET /api/notifications requires auth (401)
GET /api/notifications returns notifications list with unread_count
GET /api/notifications?limit=5 respects limit parameter
GET /api/notifications?unread_only=true returns only unread
Notification structure has notification_id, title, message, read, created_at
PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read requires auth (401)
PUT /api/notifications/read-all requires auth (401)
PUT /api/notifications/read-all marks all as read
After mark-all-read, unread_count is 0
PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read marks single notification as read
PUT /api/notifications/nonexistent/read returns success=false
Bell NOT visible when NOT logged in (data-testid=notification-bell)
Bell visible when logged in
Gold badge shows unread count (e.g. '3') (data-testid=notification-badge)
Click bell opens dropdown (data-testid=notification-dropdown)
Dropdown has 'Notifications' header
Dropdown shows notification items with gold unread dots
Dropdown has 'Mark all read' button when unread exist (data-testid=mark-all-read-btn)
Dropdown uses dark variant (dark background) on landing page
Bell visible between Welcome message and hamburger menu
Bell shows gold badge with unread count (e.g. '3')
Welcome message shows 'Welcome, Demo' (data-testid=mobile-welcome-landing)
Click bell opens dropdown on mobile
Dropdown shows 3 notifications with timestamps
Click 'Mark all read' button
Badge disappears/hidden after mark all read
Mark all read button hidden after all notifications read
Notification items show checkmarks instead of gold dots after read
Click notification item navigates to /my-enquiries
Bell visible on /venues/search when logged in
Badge shows unread count on search page
Dropdown opens on search page
Dropdown uses light variant (white background) on search page
Bell NOT present when NOT logged in on search page

seed_data_creation: 3 notifications seeded for user_00f24d1448e1 (via previous seeding). Reset unread status during testing via MongoDB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: NotificationBell component fully tested. Key data-testids: notification-bell (bell button), notification-badge (gold count badge), notification-dropdown (dropdown container), mark-all-read-btn (mark all read button), notification-item-{id} (individual notification items). The bell is positioned: Desktop - between nav links and profile dropdown in both LandingPage and Header.js; Mobile - between 'Welcome, Demo' text and hamburger menu. Two variants: variant='dark' (landing page - dark dropdown bg) and variant='light' (search page via Header.js - white dropdown bg). Auth flow: POST /api/auth/login, set localStorage 'token' and 'user', reload page. Splash screen ~5-7 seconds on landing page.
